items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Mike Gale. Elizabeth City St G signed w/KY of ABA in 71. Also played w/NY before making transition to NBA w/SA. Solid defensive PG & not a scorer (peaked at 10 ppg 6 apg). Also known for his strong fro. Retired in 82 & stayed in SA after. Died in 2020. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Mike Gale. Elizabeth City St G signed w/KY of ABA in 71. Also played w/NY before making transition to NBA w/SA. Solid defensive PG & not a scorer (peaked at 10 ppg 6 apg). Also known for his strong fro. Retired in 82 & stayed in SA after. Died in 2020. RIP.
